// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: HashTableCompact
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class fastdata final {

    static constexpr int32_t Length(std::string_view str) noexcept { return static_cast<int32_t>(str.length()); }
    static uint32_t ReadU8(const std::string_view value, const size_t offset) noexcept { return static_cast<unsigned char>(value[offset]); }

    struct e {
        std::string_view key;
        uint64_t hash_code;
        e(const std::string_view key, const uint64_t hash_code)
           : key(key), hash_code(hash_code) {}
    };

    static constexpr std::array<uint8_t, 13> bucket_starts = {
        0, 0, 0, 2, 4, 4, 5, 5, 5, 7, 
        8, 10, 11
    };

    static constexpr std::array<uint8_t, 13> bucket_counts = {
        0, 0, 2, 2, 0, 1, 0, 0, 2, 1, 
        2, 1, 2
    };

    inline static const std::array<e, 13> entries = {
        e(u8"å", 11144404053037306560), e(u8"è", 11144404032678215327), e(u8"ç", 11144404049905138678), e(u8"ê", 11144404029546047445), e(u8"ö", 11144404023281711681), e(u8"é", 11144404034244299268), e(u8"ü", 11144404013885208035), e(u8"ä", 11144404051471222619), e(u8"æ", 11144404048339054737), e(u8"ø", 11144404007620872271), 
        e(u8"à", 11144404045206886855), e(u8"ß", 11144404062433810206), e(u8"ñ", 11144404021715627740)
    };

    static constexpr uint64_t get_hash(const std::string_view value, int32_t length) noexcept {
        const auto data = value;
        int32_t offset = 0;
        uint64_t hash = 352654597ull;
        while ((length > 0))
        {
         hash = ((((hash << 5) | (hash >> 27)) + hash) ^ static_cast<uint64_t>(ReadU8(data, offset)));
         offset += 1;
         length -= 1;
        }

        hash = (352654597ull + (hash * 1566083941ull));

        return hash;
    }

public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const std::string_view key) noexcept {
        int32_t length = Length(key);

        const uint64_t hash = get_hash(key, length);
        const size_t index = hash % 13;
        const size_t start = static_cast<size_t>(bucket_starts[index]);
        const size_t count = static_cast<size_t>(bucket_counts[index]);
        const size_t end = start + count;

        for (size_t i = start; i < end; i++) {
            const auto& entry = entries[i];

            if (entry.hash_code == hash && entry.key == key)
                return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 13;
    static constexpr int32_t min_key_length = 2;
    static constexpr int32_t max_key_length = 2;
    static constexpr bool has_number = false;
    static constexpr bool has_uppercase = false;
    static constexpr bool has_lowercase = true;
    static constexpr bool has_symbol = false;
    static constexpr bool has_whitespace = false;
};
